Ecosystem, Tournament, Governance
The $MAVIA token powers the Heroes of Mavia ecosystem and governance. Learn more about the Mavia token below.

Governance and Voting

Take part in deciding the future of the Mavia ecosystem.

DAO Ownership

Take ownership in Mavia's DAO with the $MAVIA token.

Tournaments & Rewards

Earn $MAVIA rewards via tournaments and special events.

Backed by World-Class Partners

Coming Soon

Mavia DAO Governance

Token holders will be able to vote on key decisions which will direct the development of the Mavia ecosystem, including current and future games.

Legendary Marketplace Trading

Use MAVIA to trade Legendary Items on the Web Marketplace. Legendary items are NFTs which can be used and traded inside the Heroes of Mavia games, and include Skins, Decorations and Consumables.

Straightforward Tokenomics

Mavia's tokenomics are designed to promote the healthy and stable growth of the game and ecosystem. Notably, our lower-than-average inflation rate, six year vesting and fair distribution encourage healthy and vibrant ecosystem growth over time.

In-Game MAVIA Holder Rewards

Holding MAVIA tokens provides many in-game perks and rewards, encouraging players from both Web2 and Web3 to join the excitement of becoming a MAVIA holder. In-game rewards include exclusive cosmetics, decorations and skins only available to MAVIA token holders.

Future Uses Through Ecosystem Development

Within the evolving MAVIA ecosystem, the $MAVIA token is key to pioneering initiatives and enhancing user engagement. As new game features and ecosystem expansions unfold, the token's role in enriching these developments and fostering community interaction becomes increasingly central.

Mavia Tokenomics

View the MAVIA token allocation breakdown, as well as the emission schedule.

Mavia Token Release Schedule and Breakdown
  • Airdrop (3.5%)
  • Launch Partners / CEXs (2.5%)
  • Pre-Sale (15%)
  • Advisors (3%)
  • Gameplay Rewards (10%)
  • Community & Ecosystem (44%)
  • Team (22%)

Nov 2029

Airdrop: 8,750,000 (3.5%)

Launch Partners / CEXs: 6,250,000 (2.5%)

Pre-Sale: 37,500,000 (15%)

Advisors: 7,500,000 (3%)

Gameplay Rewards: 25,000,000 (10%)

Community & Ecosystem: 110,000,000 (44%)

Team: 55,000,000 (22%)

Total Circulating Supply: 250,000,000 (100%)

Additional Mavia Resources

Download the Mavia Game Deck as well as the Mavia Press Kit for branding assets.

by Skrice Studios

Skrice Studios is a blockchain game development studio based out
of Vietnam, currently working exclusively on developing Mavia.
